div1.entryFree:
Trash, vb. to lop, to crop: who to advance and who to t. for overtopping, Tp. I, 2, 81.*
Substituted by M. Edd. for brach in Shr. Ind. 1, 17, and for trace in Oth. II, 1, 312, and explained as meaning 'to restrain a dog by a trash, i. e. a strap or rope, fastened to his neck'; a signification applied by some commentators also to the passage in Tp.
